positive: Minimalist cosmic landscape featuring a stylized, bioluminescent astronaut silhouette standing on a floating geometric island. The background is a deep navy void filled with vibrant nebula dust in sapphire blue, magenta, and teal. Use strong, clean line work and high contrast. The astronaut's suit and the island should emit soft, glowing cyan and electric purple light against the dark void. Central composition, perfect for textile printing. Intricate detailing on the crystalline formations of the island. Sci-fi fantasy poster style, vector art quality, UHD, dramatic volumetric lighting, crisp edges, cinematic color grading.
negative: text, blurry, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noisy, extra limbs, extra fingers, bad anatomy, poor contrast, gradient mesh, photorealism, messy, clutter, grain
